title: Athyrium macrocarpon
taxonomy: Athyrium macrocarpon is classified in the kingdom Plantae, with further classification as follows: it belongs to the division Pteridophyta, class Polypodiopsida, order Polypodiales, family Athyriaceae, and genus Athyrium. The species Athyrium macrocarpon is a type of fern native to China. Further research may be required to confirm the classification of this specific species. It is closely related to other fern species within the Athyrium genus. The classification of Athyrium macrocarpon is subject to ongoing botanical research and potential updates.

benefits: Athyrium macrocarpon, also known as the lady fern, is a plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits.
